title: Pizza Delight
description: An addon mod for Farmer's Delight focused on pizza! Based on PizzaCraft
body:
![banner](https://i.imgur.com/SvF9eEx.png)


***

##  ⚠️ Looking for a Lead Developer!
I am currently looking for a developer to take over the main development and maintenance of this mod. If you are interested join my Discord and contact me via ping.

***

![icon](https://i.imgur.com/cm7JdLe.png)
[![kinetichosting](https://i.imgur.com/2HlGnLM.png)](https://billing.kinetichosting.net/aff.php?aff=102)
[![Discord badge](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/social/discord-singular_64h.png)](https://discord.gg/f8Nnj5VuFj)
[![Ko-Fi badge](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/donate/kofi-singular-alt_64h.png)](https://ko-fi.com/tiviacz1337)  

**Pizza Delight** is a continuation of **PizzaCraft** reimagined as an addon for the popular **Farmer's Delight** mod, bringing the world of pizza-making to your Minecraft experience!

This mod introduces new mechanics, blocks, and items, allowing you to craft pizzas from scratch. From preparing dough with a rolling pin to selecting your favorite toppings. Pizza Delight offers a unique crafting system that lets you create pizzas from any edible item in the game, dynamically calculating nourishment values and changing the appearance of your pizzas!

The player can make pizza in two ways: by using the Pizza Station block and putting ingredients in the slots, or by manually adding ingredients by right-clicking on the placed block of raw pizza. Shift-clicking on the raw pizza opens its inventory, where you can also manage your ingredients and check nourishment values.

 

On top of that, pizzas can be enhanced with sauces, ranging from regular flavors to potion-infused ones that grant special effects when you eat the delicious slices.

 

Currently, the mod is in its early stages of development, with plans to add more content and features in future updates.

 

#### **📖 Getting Started**

**Follow the advancements!** All of its progression is described through them. By default, press the **(L)** key to open the Advancements screen.

 

#### **⬇️ Want to experience making of Pizza on older version?** 

You can check out [**PizzaCraft**](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/pizzacraft), a standalone mod for Minecraft that adds pizza, new blocks, and crops. Discontinued in favor of **Pizza Delight** for Minecraft 1.20.1+
